headline: Mateus Fernandes
body: 🚨⚪️ Mateus Fernandes completed his medical and signed in as new Tottenham player from West Ham. £85m deal, formally sealed.
raw_text:
🚨⚪️ Mateus Fernandes completed his medical and signed in as new Tottenham player from West Ham.

£85m deal, formally sealed.
text:

draft_caption:
